issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (Main effect activates when card is played), not 'Activated'
Condition must check 'LeaderHasAnyType' with value 'Whitebeard Pirates', not 'Always'

SearchDeck action is incomplete: missing 'count' (should be 3 cards to look at), missing proper filter for card types ('Whitebeard Pirates' OR 'Monkey.D.Luffy'), and should reveal up to 1 card, not all
Second effect with DrawCard is extraneous and incorrect; the card effect does not grant a draw. Effect should handle placement of remaining cards at top/bottom of deck
Missing action to place remaining cards back on deck (top or bottom). The full effect requires SearchDeck with reveal/add to hand, then placement of rest
